name: Cinetreak Cinelive C1 HDMI FHD Live-Streaming Switcher
description: Use the CineLive CL-C1 Compact 4-Channel HDMI Switcher from CineTreak to mix and live stream up to 1080p60 video and embedded audio.

features.Key Features :: 4 x HDMI Inputs, 2 x HDMI Outputs | Multi RTMP Livestreaming via USB-C & LAN | Supports Up to 1080p60 Video | Luma & Chromakey, LOGO, PiP and PoP | H.264 Encoding with 2-Ch Audio | VISCA Control for up to 4 x PTZ Cameras | USB-A Recording, Tally Port | 2 x 3.5mm Mic/Line Audio Inputs
features.What's in the box?: Cinetreak Cinelive C1 HDMI FHD Live-Streaming Switcher | 12 VDC, 2A Power Adapter
